reach_why: Extends familiar benchmark-critique ideas, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links historical narrative, benchmark leakage, and irrelevant truths as a test of disciplined relevance.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying irrelevant truths and target-known benchmarks; measure whether performance tracks form retrieval over discovery.
explanation: Benchmarks can reward recognizable form while masking genuine discovery and failure to ignore irrelevant truths.
